message:
fix: countLines trailing newline bug and remove dead code

- Fix countLines in checkpoint/capture.go to not overcount lines when
  string ends with newline. "hello\nworld\n" is 2 lines, not 3.
  Aligns with correct implementation in output/diff.go.

- Remove unused splitLines function from events/logger.go (dead code)

- Update tests to expect correct line counts and use bytes.Split

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
